1. Model Overview
This model summary defines the reusable engineering basis and EBOM scope for the 174K LNG carrier.

2. EBOM Items

- ENG-XDF-01 / Main engine package X-DF / Qty 1
- CARGO-TANK-NO96 / Cargo tank system NO96 / Qty 4
- CARGO-PUMP-01 / Cargo pump set / Qty 2

3. Design Notes
- Existing hull form reused for edit design baseline.
- Engine room arrangement based on X-DF package.
- Cargo handling model aligned with 174K capacity.
